Home.title: Sword Art Online
Home.aboutP1: Explore a living virtual world filled with monsters, mysteries, and thousands of other players. Create your hero, develop your skills, and forge your own path across a vast universe.
Home.aboutP2: Conquer dangerous dungeons, defeat powerful bosses, gather rare gear, and fight your way to the top of the global rankings!
Home.aboutP3: Level up anywhere and anytime, because this game works perfectly and looks great on both a computer and a mobile device! The hero explores the world and fights on his own, so the controls are very convenient even on a smartphone screen!
Home.f1Desc: Expansive regions, thousands of quests, and a branching storyline. Every choice shapes your hero's fate and creates a unique experience.
Home.f2Desc: Play anywhere - the project is perfectly optimized and looks equally good on a large PC screen and on a smartphone!
Home.f3Desc: Dynamic battles with convenient auto-combat. Increase power, change equipment, and use powerful skills even on the go!
Home.f4Desc: Recruit powerful allies, level up their abilities, and build unbeatable combat teams.
Home.f5Desc: Challenge incredibly strong opponents. Use tactics, smelting, and forging items to achieve victory!
Home.f6Desc: Create powerful guilds, team up with friends, and fight in arenas for the title of the strongest fighter on the server!
Home.footerCopy: Gaming Portal Sword Art Online LLC © 2026 – 2026
Home.entrySubtitle: Browser MMORPG - play right in your browser
Home.waitlistDesc: The game is still in development. Drop your email and we will be the first to let you know when servers go live.
Home.waitlistNote: No spam. Just one email: when we launch.
Home.waitlistSuccessMsg: We will email {email} as soon as servers open. Meanwhile, join our Discord and forum so you don't miss news.

Support.title: Support
Support.subtitle: We are here to help. Find your answer in the FAQ, contact us directly, or submit a ticket using the form below.
Support.quickDesc: Choose a convenient way to reach us.
Support.faqDesc: Your answer might already be here.

faq.q: How do I reset my password?
faq.a: On the login page click "Forgot password?" and enter the email you used to register. We will send you a reset link. If you signed in via Google - manage your password in your Google account settings.

faq.q: Can I change my username and email after registration?
faq.a: Yes. Go to Settings → Profile and edit the fields. Username must be 3–20 characters and unique. Email must be valid and not already taken.

faq.q: How do I delete my account?
faq.a: In Settings → Account there is a "Danger zone" section. Click "Delete account", type your username to confirm - the action is irreversible, all progress and purchases will be lost.

Yes. The site and game are adapted for phones and tablets. Recommended browsers: Chrome, Safari, Firefox, Edge - latest versions. On older devices disable animations in Settings → Preferences to improve performance.

faq.q: I signed in with Google - what about the password?
faq.a: When signing in with Google, no separate password is created on our site. You can only log in via Google. To change your Google password, go to Google security settings.

faq.q: How do I report a bug?
faq.a: Submit a ticket via the form below with the "Bug / Error" category. Include: what you did, what you expected, what happened, browser and OS, attach screenshots or video if possible. This speeds up investigation.

faq.q: Can I play on multiple devices?
faq.a: Yes. Your progress is tied to your account and syncs between devices. Just log in with the same credentials from any browser. Simultaneous game sessions from one account are not allowed - the older one will be logged out.

faq.q: I paid for a donation but did not get the reward - what should I do?
faq.a: Purchases are usually credited instantly. If nothing arrived within 15 minutes - submit a ticket with category "Payment / Donations", attach a screenshot or transaction ID. We will refund or grant the purchase manually.

Support.formDesc: Describe the problem in detail and we will help.
Support.formMessageHint: Minimum 20 characters. Describe steps to reproduce, browser, time of event.
Support.attachHint: PNG, JPG, PDF, TXT, LOG · MP4, WEBM, MOV · up to 5 MB (images/docs) and 20 MB (video) · max 5 files
Support.attachTooBig: ✗ File "{filename}" is too large (5 MB for images/docs, 20 MB for video)
Support.successMsg: ✓ Ticket submitted! We will respond within 24 hours.
Support.ticketErrNetwork: Network is unavailable. Please try again in a minute.
Support.ticketErrGeneric: Could not submit the ticket. Please double-check and try again.

Tickets.chatForbidden: You do not have access to this ticket.
